summary: Unlistenable recording that drowns out the music, making the show effectively worthless despite any potential performance merit
review: The sole reviewer finds the audio virtually inaudible, describing the recording as horrible and not worth a download. No comments on musical performance are provided, so the show's quality cannot be assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one low‑star review mentioning severe recording problems; no positive aspects to offset, leading to a very low overall rating with limited confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audio is essentially inaudible; reviewers cannot hear the music at all, indicating severe clarity and mix issues.
